assertions: h1_h3_stand: H1 and H3 kept CONFIRMED (repro-complete)
h2_h4_downgraded: H2 and H4 downgraded to INCONCLUSIVE
missing_items_named: per-entry list of exactly whats missing (command/n/spread/env/commit)
restore_path_named: what would re-earn CONFIRMED stated
no_pretend_rerun: audit does not claim to have re-run unrunnable probes
